_doc: A few files exceed the 400-line ceiling. Enabling the biome formatter (2026-06) expanded single-line bodies and the checkJs burndown (2026-06, Workstream B2) added per-symbol JSDoc type annotations — both grow line counts without adding logic. Each such file is pinned to its current baseline so the check still hard-fails on further drift. database.js is a delegation facade whose one-line pass-throughs biome expands to ~3 lines each and which now carries @param types for ~90 methods — a candidate for splitting the delegation map.

exempt._reason: Search Web Worker — title index, inverted/prefix builders, scoring, and postMessage protocol in one file because Web Workers can't share scope across module boundaries without a bundler. Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.

DocsDatabase delegation facade over the per-domain repos; biome expands its one-line pass-throughs to ~3 lines each and the checkJs burndown added @param/@returns JSDoc for ~90 methods. Splitting would only scatter the delegation map. Candidate for a future split.
Web HTML templating cluster (routes -> templates -> context). Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.
Query planner with FTS5/title-exact/trigram/body variants sharing uniform filter + projection logic. Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.

Public-output projection for every command/MCP/web payload — the single sanctioned shaping layer. The checkJs burndown added @param/@returns JSDoc across its projectors. Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.
Documents repo — CRUD + search-record assembly. The checkJs burndown pushed it just over 400 via @param JSDoc. Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.
Worker-thread reader pool (strict/deep) + main-thread fallback. The checkJs burndown added @param/@typedef JSDoc. Baseline includes biome + checkJs JSDoc.
CLI dispatcher (search/read/sync/setup/mcp/web/status). Formatter-normalized baseline (biome); P7 migrates this to a swift-argument-parser CLI.
